known_gaps: KiCad ERC still reports warning-level pin_to_pin findings for unspecified/passive schematic connections.
KiCad ERC still reports warning-level unconnected_wire_endpoint findings on regulator-area schematic stubs, but no pin_not_connected errors remain.
AMS1117 fabrication-candidate use still requires regulator stability, ESR, thermal, and selected-manufacturer review before fabrication-ready promotion.
notes: Medium-complexity AI-generated KiCad-backed fixture combining USB-C power, protected 5 V input, 3.3 V regulator rail, I2C sensor, pull-ups, decoupling, and a header. It now reaches candidate with clean blocking DRC evidence and no KiCad ERC errors; remaining promotion work is warning cleanup and fabrication-grade regulator proof.
